message:
fix(ui): use single-pass unescape for YAML frontmatter parsing

The sequential ReplaceAll approach corrupted strings containing literal
\n (backslash + n): after \\→\ conversion, the resulting \n was then
incorrectly converted to a real newline. Single-pass escape processing
handles all sequences correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
